items.label: Release Date
items.detail: Global simultaneous launch across all platforms. Midnight ET / 9PM PT on October 23rd.

items.label: Developer
items.detail: Lead development by Infinity Ward with support from Beenox, Raven Software, and Sledgehammer Games.

items.label: Platforms
items.detail: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam & Battle.net). Available on Game Pass day one.

items.label: Engine
items.detail: Enhanced version of the proprietary IW engine with improved ray tracing, volumetric lighting, and photogrammetry.

items.label: Campaign
items.detail: Captain Price, Soap, Ghost, and Gaz return for a globe-spanning narrative. Single-player campaign included.

items.label: Multiplayer
items.detail: 16 core maps including fan-favorite remasters. New movement system, perks overhaul, and day-one ranked play.

items.label: Warzone Integration
items.detail: Full Warzone integration with new MW4 weapons, operators, and a fresh battle royale map at launch.

items.label: Zombies Mode
items.detail: Zombies mode reportedly coming as post-launch content, co-developed with Treyarch. Not confirmed officially.

items.label: PC Requirements
items.detail: Minimum: RTX 3060 / RX 6600, 16GB RAM, SSD required. Supports DLSS 3.5 and FSR 3.1.
